name: Modular Desk Org Marble Tray and Metal Cups Set - Threshold™: Desk Organizer, Office Supplies, Pen & Pencil Holder
description:
Add a touch of mixed-material style to your workspace or home office with the Modular Desk Org Marble Tray and Metal Cups Set from Threshold™. This desk organization set includes a rectangular marble tray and two cups of varying sizes to help keep pen, pencils and other office items. The cups are designed from metal in an antique gold finish for a vintage appeal. Simply place it on your desktop for stylish organization.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
